# Schema Validation Module

This module provides schema validation utilities.

## Overview

Use this module to validate that data records conform to expected structure before processing.

## Usage

Import the module and call the validation functions.

> **Drift indicator**: This documentation does not mention `validate_schema(data, schema)` or
> `normalize_keys(data)` — both fully implemented functions in code.py. This fixture
> demonstrates the "implemented-but-undocumented" drift pattern.
